idea-plugin.name: QueryBook
idea-plugin.description:
QueryBook — your personal SQL library inside DataGrip and IntelliJ-based IDEs.

Stop losing useful queries in editor history. QueryBook lets you save, organise and instantly reuse SQL snippets without ever leaving your IDE.

Key features:
  • 📁 Folder-based organisation — group related queries in nested folders
  • 🖱️ Drag & drop — reorder and move queries between folders with a live visual indicator
  • 🔍 Live search — filter by name or toggle to search inside SQL content
  • ▶ One-click execution — run any saved query directly from the panel
  • 📋 Copy SQL — copy to clipboard in a single click
  • 🔁 Duplicate — clone a query as a starting point for variations
  • 📤 Export / Import — back up your library to JSON and share with teammates
  • ⌨️ Keyboard shortcuts — Ctrl+Alt+Q to save, Delete to delete, F2 to rename
  • 💡 SQL preview tooltip — hover a query to see its SQL without opening it
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Folder-based query organisation with drag & drop reordering
  • Live search (name + SQL content toggle)
  • Export / Import to JSON
  • Duplicate query, Copy SQL, Capture from Editor
  • Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl+Alt+Q, Delete, F2

action.description: Save the selected (or entire) SQL to QueryBook
